data.title: BrainsWay to Participate in the 25th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference
data.description: In Burlington, Mass. and Jerusalem, an announcement was made on April 13, 2026, by BrainsWay Ltd (NASDAQ & TASE: BWAY), a top player in cutting-edge noninvasive neurostimulation therapies for mental health conditions. The Company shared that its management is slated to speak at the 25th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference at 8:45 AM ET on Wednesday, April 15, 2026.

data.title: Enphase Energy Expands Commercial Microinverter Deployments Across the United States
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Enphase Energy, Inc., a global energy technology company traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ENPH, revealed that they are increasing shipments of commercial microinverter products from their U.S. manufacturing plants. This move comes in response to a rising interest among installers for a more straightforward and dependable option compared to conventional string inverters in the commercial solar industry. The specific products being shipped are the IQ9N-3P™ and IQ8P-3P™ Commercial Microinverters.

data.title: Scotts® Raises the Bar in Lawn Care with Innovative, Family-Safe Turf Builder® Lawn Food
data.description: A revolutionary new formula has been released by Scotts®, the top lawn care brand in North America. The latest Turf Builder® Lawn Food unveiled on April 13, 2026, in Marysville, Ohio, offers unparalleled results and provides consumers with peace of mind. This innovative product ensures that lawns are equipped to withstand real-life challenges.

data.title: Leal Therapeutics Announces Executive Leadership Appointments and Provides Business Update
data.description: In Worcester, Massachusetts on April 13, 2026, Leal Therapeutics, Inc. introduced new leadership. Dr. Johannes Tauscher was appointed as the Chief Medical Officer and Raymond Jordt, M.B.A., M.S. as the Chief Business Officer. Leal specializes in neuro-metabolic therapeutics.

data.title: Oracle Helps Utilities Reduce Costs and Deliver Measurable Impact with AI
data.description: In Austin, Texas on April 13, 2026, during the Oracle Customer Edge Summit, it was announced that a comprehensive industry suite has been developed to streamline customer, grid, and asset operations. This integration aims to reduce costs, enhance reliability, and elevate customer experiences. The utility sector is facing challenges to finance significant infrastructure upgrades.

data.title: Boardwalk Pipelines Relocates Corporate Headquarters to Support Growth
data.description: In West Houston near the Energy Corridor, Boardwalk Pipelines, LP ("Boardwalk") revealed plans to shift its corporate headquarters to 990 Town and Country Blvd. The relocation is set to finish by fall 2026. This move signifies a significant development for the company as it accommodates its expanding operations.

data.title: RevSpring Launches Guide for Providers to Reduce Demand Leakage and Improve Provider Search Conversion on Your Domain
data.description: RevSpring, based in Nashville, Tennessee, has rolled out a new on-domain discovery feature aiming to enhance search performance and increase appointment bookings by linking provider and location directories with site content. Optional Experience Studio services are offered for advanced customization. The update was announced on April 13, 2026.

data.title: NHC Introduces Updated Customer and Partner Portals with Real-Time Dashboards and Enhanced Visibility
data.description: Concord, Massachusetts - In a recent press release on April 13, 2026, NHC revealed advancements to its Management and Assurance Platform (MAP). The latest enhancements include upgraded Service and Billing dashboards, aimed at enhancing the accessibility and oversight of customer and partner environments. The revamped features are intended to streamline the way users can access, monitor, and administer their systems through the platform.

data.title: Caturus Energy Announces Offering of $500 Million of Senior Notes
data.description: Houston-based Caturus Energy, LLC revealed its plans to issue $500 million in senior unsecured notes maturing in 2031. The company will offer the notes in a private placement to eligible purchasers.

data.title: Tellabs to Exhibit at CoSN 2026, Bringing Next-Generation Connectivity to K-12 Education Leaders
data.description: A technology company based in Carrollton, Texas, is set to showcase the benefits of optical networking in enhancing connectivity for school districts and driving better results for students and teachers. Tellabs revealed their participation in CoSN 2026, a leading yearly conference, where they will illustrate the impact of optical networking. The event aims to bring together education leaders and technology experts to discuss the future of digital learning. Scheduled for April 13, 2026, the exhibition will highlight ways in which optical networking can revolutionize connectivity in educational settings. This move underscores Tellabs' dedication to transforming the education sector through innovative technological solutions.

data.title: CHIPOTLE RELAUNCHES REWARDS WITH "REWARDS ON REPEAT," DELIVERING MORE VALUE WITHOUT TRADE-OFFS
data.description: Chipotle is moving into a new phase of digital growth, with 21 million active members playing a key role in driving a large portion of the company's sales. As part of this growth, the company has introduced new benefits such as monthly free food drops, expanded options for redeeming rewards points, and longer expiration periods for accumulated points. Additionally, Chipotle is launching a new in-restaurant campaign and offering incentives for its staff to further enhance the customer experience.

data.title: CHC: Creating Healthier Communities Elects Edo Banach to its National Board of Directors
data.description: In Alexandria, Virginia, on April 13, 2026, CHC: Creating Healthier Communities made the news of appointing Edo Banach, a healthcare regulatory and policy specialist, to their national board of directors. This announcement comes after Mr. Banach, who currently serves as Partner and Co-Chair of the Healthcare Department at a prominent organization, was unanimously elected to the position. This move highlights CHC's commitment to bolster their leadership team with seasoned professionals in the healthcare field.
